face.structure: slightly rounded with a delicate chin and high cheekbones adding to a subtly angled jawline that conveys her composed demeanor

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with a slightly upward tilt at the outer corners
eyes.color: dark chocolate brown with a subtle gradient of amber near the pupils
details: fine light-catching lines radiating from the pupils
small, sharp highlights in the upper right quadrant for depth
eyes.expression_effect: a thoughtful and calculating gaze, often seen with narrowed lids as if analyzing

face.expression: a faint, controlled smile with a demeanor that is both inviting yet distant

skin.tone: light beige with a cool, soft pink undertone
skin.undertone: cool with subtle, gentle transitioning areas
skin.texture: smooth with minimal visible pores and a delicate glow across the cheeks
skin.rendering_notes: maintain soft gradients with a light bounce of natural highlights across the forehead and nose

hair.color: deep black with subtle blue highlights at the edges
hair.style: naturally straight and long, reaching mid-back
hair.flow: flows sleekly over shoulders, ends taper softly
details: a singular thin braid intertwined on the right side
occasional stray hairs framing the face

character.aura: calm and composed, yet harboring a sense of silent intensity

outfit.design: clean lines with gentle accents of silver threading along the seams
details: stand-up collar with a subtle embroidered pattern
tight cuffs voicing attention to detail
outfit.fit: tailored to fit snugly while allowing ease of movement

composition.framing: medium close-up capturing from the waist up
composition.pose: slightly angled to the viewer with one hand resting on the hip
composition.gesture: right hand lightly touching the chin, indicating contemplation

background.color_palette: muted grays and blues creating a soft, blurred effect
background.details: gentle diagonal stripes giving a sense of forward motion
background.rules: avoid any specific or distracting elements that take focus from the character
